title: RPZ Beta Vanilla
description: Vanilla modpack that provides enhanced Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 experience and fixes annoying bugs with certain blocks, items, etc. It also uses TAB mod to properly display tablist for servers with Essentials or RetroCommands.
body: Vanilla modpack that provides enhanced Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 experience and fixes annoying bugs with certain blocks, items, etc. It also uses TAB mod to properly display tablist for servers with Essentials or RetroCommands.
